text:
PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_12 

LABEL: Provider Number Active Indicator — January through December 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the provider’s identifiers information specified in the unique combination of 
identifier variables (PRVDR_NUM_SYS, PRVDR_NUM, PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID) was active in the 
given month. Each of 12 months.

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_01 
PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_02 
PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_03 
PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_04 
PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_05 
PRVDR_NUM_ACTV_IND_06
